creator: schweikh@noc.dfn.de
text:
/etc/motd  says

If the info distribution has been loaded on this machine
the FreeBSD Handbook will be in file:/usr/share/doc/handbook
and the FAQ in file:/usr/share/doc/FAQ

When I insert the first CD with the info.?? files and
install them I still miss both of them.
The doc.?? files don't contain them either.

What should I do to get these installed?
